Class MemoryFileRepo

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.consistency.AbstractFileRepo
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.consistency.MemoryFileRepo
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProofDisposedListener, FileRepo
public class MemoryFileRepo extends AbstractFileRepo
This class uses the memory as a store for the proof-relevant files.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class AbstractFileRepo

    CLASS_MATCHER, JAVA_MATCHER, KEY_MATCHER, REDUX_URL, RULES_URL, ZIP_MATCHER

    • MemoryFileRepo

      public MemoryFileRepo()

  • Method Details

    • getInputStream

      public InputStream getInputStream(Path path)
      Description copied from interface: FileRepo
      Provides access to a file on disk. May return null if the path cannot be handled by this repository.
      Specified by:
      getInputStream in interface FileRepo
      Overrides:
      getInputStream in class AbstractFileRepo
      Parameters:
      path - the path of the file
      Returns:
      an InputStream of the requested file, or null

    • getInputStream

      public InputStream getInputStream(RuleSource ruleSource)
      Description copied from interface: FileRepo
      Provides access to the InputStream of a RuleSource. The file the RuleSource is read from is registered to the FileRepo. May return null if the source cannot be handled by this repository.
      Specified by:
      getInputStream in interface FileRepo
      Overrides:
      getInputStream in class AbstractFileRepo
      Parameters:
      ruleSource - the RuleSource
      Returns:
      an InputStream of the RuleSource, or null

    • getInputStream

      public InputStream getInputStream(URL url)
      Description copied from interface: FileRepo
      Provides access to the InputStream of a file identified by an URL. The file is registered to the FileRepo. May return null if the url cannot be handled by this repository.
      Parameters:
      url - the URL of the file
      Returns:
      an InputStream to the file identified by the URL, or null

    • createOutputStream

      public OutputStream createOutputStream(Path path)
      Description copied from interface: FileRepo
      This method can be used to write a file that has no counterpart outside to the FileRepo.
      Parameters:
      path - the path of the file to store. The path must be relative to the base directory of the proof package.
      Returns:
      an OutputStream to the file in the FileRepo

    • getInputStreamInternal

      public InputStream getInputStreamInternal(Path p)
      Description copied from class: AbstractFileRepo
      Can be used to get a direct InputStream to a file stored in the FileRepo. The concrete implementation depends on the concrete FileRepo.
      Specified by:
      getInputStreamInternal in class AbstractFileRepo
      Parameters:
      p - the original path (outside the FileRepo) of the requested file
      Returns:
      an InputStream of the resource or null if it has not been stored in the FileRepo before.

    • getSaveName

      public Path getSaveName(Path path)
      Description copied from class: AbstractFileRepo
      Return the save name for a given file.
      Specified by:
      getSaveName in class AbstractFileRepo
      Parameters:
      path - the given file (absolute or relative to the proof base directory)
      Returns:
      the name (may include subdirectories) the file should have in proof package, that is a path relative to the root of the package
